subject: english
learning_objectives: Identify the focus of the comprehension passage
Read the passage for detail and understanding
Answer questions based on the text

sections.heading: Passage Focus
sections.content: The passage centres on Yvonne and Yvette, twins born connected head to head, the doctors' predictions about survival, and the way the sisters lived above their challenges.

sections.heading: Activity
sections.content: Students read the passage carefully and answer all questions based on it.
